title: Clever Crow
description: Clever Crow is a physics puzzle inspired by the classic fable. A thirsty crow must raise the water in a long-necked jar high enough to drink by tossing objects in to displace it. But choose wisely big stones are efficient yet wont fit a narrow neck, ice floats and melts, cork barely helps, and a sponge soaks up your water.
